ideation: This animation sequence portrays a respectful and serene figure, befitting the emoji.  The animation will focus on a slight adjustment of the arms, reflecting a calm and composed demeanor. The lack of elbows in the robot's arm design will be addressed by creating fluid, non-jerky movements using the shoulder joints. Frame 1 will start with a neutral pose, arms slightly away from the body.  Frame 2 will show a subtle inward movement of the arms, palms facing inward slightly, suggesting a gentle folding of arms. Frame 3 will have the arms slightly lower and closer to the sides, maintaining the peaceful pose. Frame 4 will return to a neutral pose similar to frame 1, allowing for a loop and natural-looking repetition of the animation.

frames.beat: arms rest at sides, serene and composed
arms lift slightly, palms turning inward gently
arms fold closer, settling into peaceful stillness
arms return to a relaxed, neutral stance
